entries.reason: The visual projection model belongs with projection surfaces, not under examples.
The legacy examples visual-projection-models bucket was emptied by the rehome and removed from the filesystem.
Updated self-sketch path references so the CLI resolves the rehomed visual model under projections/visual-models.
Aligned the story packet to the rehomed visual model path.
Clarified self-binding authority against the new projections/visual-models location.
Updated the conveyor narrative to point at the new projection root.
Reconciled the design packet to the new visual projection model location.
Updated the receipt to point at the rehomed visual projection model.
Refreshed the 008B run manifest after the visual model move.
Updated the gap analysis to use the new projection root.
Updated root repository guidance to mention the new shape and the CLI source lineage.
Expanded the tree shape to show the first-class conveyor role folders and the CLI source origin.
